description: Behavior evals check that when fired the skill writes a complete, concrete plan with all 5 steps per task, uses docs-lookup to confirm uncertain library/framework APIs before writing code blocks, refuses when contracts are not approved, and produces no placeholder code.

cases.prompt: Write an implementation plan for order-service for PROJ-1234. Contracts are approved. The service needs one endpoint: POST /api/orders/discount that accepts {amount: BigDecimal, tier: String} and returns {discountedAmount: BigDecimal}. Write the plan to features/PROJ-1234/order-service-plan.md and update feature-state.json.
Write a plan for order-service for PROJ-1234. Note: feature-state.json shows contracts_approved: false.

Write an implementation plan for discount-service for PROJ-999. Contracts approved. The service has one class: DiscountService with a calculateDiscount(BigDecimal amount, String tier) method that returns 5% of amount when tier is 'gold' and amount > 100, else 0. Write the plan to features/PROJ-999/discount-service-plan.md.

Write an implementation plan for payment-service for PROJ-777. Contracts approved. The service needs: a PaymentRepository.findPendingByCustomer method, a PaymentService.processPending business logic method, and a PaymentController POST /api/payments/process endpoint. Write the plan to features/PROJ-777/payment-service-plan.md.

Write a plan for order-service for PROJ-555. Contracts approved. Only focus on order-service — do not include tasks for other services like notification-service or payment-service. The plan is for adding a discount field to OrderDTO and a corresponding mapper update. Write the plan to features/PROJ-555/order-service-plan.md.

must_not_contain_in_output: and then in the other service

cases.prompt: Write an implementation plan for order-service for PROJ-1234. Contracts approved. One task's test and implementation use a MapStruct mapper API and a Spring Data repository method you are not certain are current. Before writing the test/impl code blocks the executor will copy verbatim, how do you confirm the API is current?
